versions.version_description: Not a literal arrangement... this is for a solo rhythm guitarist to best approximate the song and harmonies.

tuning: E A D G B E
content:
YouTube link: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=DYOFX5T90zw

[Intro]
Drum fill (2 bars)

[tab][ch]Dm[/ch]
(Drums + Muted bass, 5 bars)[/tab]

[Verse 1]
[tab]           [ch]Em[/ch]        [ch]D[/ch]             [ch]Em[/ch]         [ch]D[/ch]
We want to multiply, are you gonna do it?[/tab]
[tab]           [ch]Em[/ch]       [ch]D[/ch]             [ch]Em[/ch]          [ch]D[/ch]
I know you qualify, are you gonna do it?[/tab]
[tab]            [ch]Em[/ch]             [ch]D[/ch]             [ch]Em[/ch]         [ch]D[/ch]
Don't be so circumscribed, are you gonna do it?[/tab]
[tab]             [ch]Em[/ch]           [ch]D[/ch]             [ch]Em[/ch]         [ch]D[/ch]
Just get yourself untied, are you gonna do it?[/tab]

[Bridge 1]
[tab][ch]D/C[/ch]  [ch]Dsus4/C[/ch]     [ch]D[/ch]  [ch]Dsus4[/ch]
Feel....... the heat[/tab]
[tab][ch]Em[/ch]
Pushing you to decide[/tab]
[tab][ch]D/C[/ch]  [ch]Dsus4/C[/ch]     [ch]D[/ch]  [ch]Dsus4[/ch]
Feel....... the heat[/tab]
[tab][ch]Em[/ch]
Burning you up, ready or not[/tab]

[Chorus 1]
[tab][ch]Em[/ch]                         [ch]C[/ch]              [ch]D[/ch]          [ch]Em[/ch]    [ch]C[/ch]    [ch]D[/ch]
Some like it hot, and some sweat when the heat is on[/tab]
[tab][ch]Em[/ch]                       [ch]C[/ch]              [ch]D[/ch]           [ch]Em[/ch]    [ch]C[/ch]    [ch]D[/ch]
Some feel the heat and decide that they can't go on[/tab]
[tab][ch]Em[/ch]                        [ch]C[/ch]              [ch]D[/ch]            [ch]Em[/ch]    [ch]C[/ch]    [ch]D[/ch]
Some like it hot, but you can't tell how hot till you try[/tab]
[tab][ch]Em[/ch]                         [ch]C[/ch]           [ch]D[/ch]            [ch]Em[/ch]    [ch]C[/ch]    [ch]D[/ch]
Some like it hot, so let's turn up the heat till we fry[/tab]

[Verse 2]
[tab]            [ch]Em[/ch]            [ch]D[/ch]             [ch]Em[/ch]         [ch]D[/ch]
The girl is at your side, are you gonna do it?[/tab]
[tab]             [ch]Em[/ch]             [ch]D[/ch]             [ch]Em[/ch]         [ch]D[/ch]
She wants to be your bride, are you gonna do it?[/tab]
[tab]             [ch]Em[/ch]        [ch]D[/ch]             [ch]Em[/ch]         [ch]D[/ch]
She wants to multiply, are you gonna do it?[/tab]
[tab]                    [ch]Em[/ch]         [ch]D[/ch]          [ch]Em[/ch]         [ch]D[/ch]
I know you won't be satisfied,  until you do it[/tab]

[Bridge 2]
[tab][ch]D/C[/ch]  [ch]Dsus4/C[/ch]     [ch]D[/ch]  [ch]Dsus4[/ch]
Feel....... the heat[/tab]
[tab][ch]Em[/ch]
Pushing you to decide[/tab]

[Chorus 2]
[tab][ch]Em[/ch]                         [ch]C[/ch]              [ch]D[/ch]          [ch]Em[/ch]    [ch]C[/ch]    [ch]D[/ch]
Some like it hot, and some sweat when the heat is on[/tab]

Some like it hot,    some like it hot[/tab]
